It’s one of the lowest prices we’ve seen so far, coming within $20 of its all-time low of $479 from earlier this year when it was discounted for the Presidents Day sale. This is a solid chance to grab it at nearly the same price in case you missed that earlier offer, so be sure to grab it after getting more details below.
